Metadata.title: Nataliia | Front-End Developer Portfolio
Metadata.description: Showcasing projects in React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

Hero.description: I craft immersive, high-performance web experiences with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Passionate about clean code and cutting-edge design.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.exploreMyWorkDesc: I've worked on {count} exciting projects across various domains, including restaurants, sports and event booking platforms, email template creation, and advertising campaigns.
Projects.exploreMyWorkAction: Select a project from the sidebar to view detailed information.

ProjectDetails.description-1: This was my main project — a comprehensive restaurant platform that included an admin panel for restaurant owners and a digital menu for customers. Customers could access menus via direct links or custom QR codes generated in the admin panel. The platform also included additional systems: a super-admin panel for internal management and a centralized directory of restaurants available on the platform. The menu system supported multiple ordering flows, including delivery, car pickup, dine-in, and scheduled orders. Users could select delivery zones, leave ratings, and pay either online or in cash. On the administrative side, we implemented advanced restaurant management features, including table management with interactive floor maps. The platform also supported integrations with POS and KDS systems as additional products.
ProjectDetails.description-2: This project was a restaurant platform that included an admin panel and a customer-facing menu. Compared to my main project, this platform had a simpler architecture and less customization. The shopping cart functionality was implemented using a third-party library, which simplified the overall flow. The system supported online payments directly within the menu, and orders were processed in real time, allowing restaurants to receive them instantly.
ProjectDetails.description-3: This project was another restaurant platform that included an admin panel and a customer-facing menu. The system was designed with a simpler architecture but followed best practices and proven solutions based on experience from previous projects, helping to minimize potential issues and improve stability. The platform supported online payments directly within the menu, real-time order processing visible in the admin panel, as well as menu management and analytics features for restaurant owners.
ProjectDetails.description-4: This project was a restaurant platform that included an admin panel and a customer-facing menu. The platform supported both online and cash payments, as well as real-time order processing. It was built using modern libraries and best practices to ensure scalability, performance, and maintainability. The system also included core restaurant management features such as menu management, order tracking, analytics, and customer feedback.
ProjectDetails.description-5: This project was a booking platform for sports venues, including football fields, basketball courts, tennis courts, table tennis, yoga, pilates, and more. The system consisted of two main applications: an admin panel for business owners and a customer-facing booking platform. Business owners could register and create listings for their venues, configuring availability hours, buffer time between bookings, and additional options such as parking or equipment. These options were visible and selectable during the booking process. The platform supported online payments via Moyasar and included a flexible cancellation policy system, allowing businesses to define custom refund rules based on time before booking. The application was fully localized (Arabic and English) and supported role-based access control, enabling business owners to manage staff accounts with restricted permissions. The system also provided booking management, allowing businesses to view scheduled bookings and cancel them when necessary, with automatic user notifications.
ProjectDetails.description-6: This project was a booking platform for event venues such as wedding restaurants, birthday locations, and other celebration spaces. The platform included an admin panel for business owners and a customer-facing booking system with online payments. It also supported additional services, booking management, statistics, and cancellation flows.
ProjectDetails.description-7: This project was an email marketing platform with subscription-based access. It included user and client management, authentication (login, registration, password reset), and subscription plans with different usage limits (e.g., number of emails per month). The platform allowed admins to manage client lists and create email campaigns with customizable templates and dynamic variables.
ProjectDetails.description-8: This project was an internal advertising management system for a company, with a strong focus on stability and testing. The platform allowed users to manage advertisements in real time, including editing, viewing details, and tracking changes. It also included role-based access, authentication, and a logging system that recorded all modifications made by users. Each release was carefully tested in a staging environment by the client’s team before going live.
ProjectDetails.details-1: I played a key role in developing and scaling the platform, working across multiple critical areas. I led the migration of the project to TypeScript, improving code quality and maintainability. I also refactored form handling by replacing Formik with React Hook Form, significantly improving performance and developer experience. I implemented complex payment systems, including Stripe (payments and subscriptions), Stripe Checkout, Apple Pay, and later Moyasar integration. I developed and enhanced core ordering functionality, including delivery, pickup, car pickup, dine-in, and scheduled orders. I also implemented split payment logic, allowing users to divide payments by items, remaining balance, or custom amounts. I built advanced pricing logic, including tax calculation (inclusive and exclusive), delivery fees, service charges, and a flexible discount system that dynamically selects the best available offer for the user. I worked extensively with maps and geolocation features, including user location detection, interactive map controls, and address search. I implemented a customer account system with saved payment methods, order history, delivery addresses, and loyalty programs. The loyalty system allowed users to earn rewards and redeem them. I contributed to a major platform migration from version 1 to version 2, including support for restaurant branches while preserving core links. Additionally, I developed analytics features, customizable UI themes with live previews, and improved overall application architecture by refactoring large and complex components.
ProjectDetails.details-2: I joined this project as a supporting developer, focusing on maintenance, bug fixing, and feature development. I resolved multiple issues related to the payment flow and improved overall stability. I also implemented additional features, including tipping functionality and service fee logic. I enhanced the user experience by adding infinite scroll and implementing drag-and-drop functionality for managing menu items in the admin panel.
ProjectDetails.details-3: I developed this project from scratch, taking ownership of most of the implementation. Later, another developer joined the project, but I was responsible for the core architecture and main features. This was one of my first large-scale projects built almost independently, where I worked with new libraries and approaches, contributing to a more scalable and maintainable architecture from the start. I implemented the entire admin panel, including menu management, order handling, and analytics. I also contributed significantly to the development of the customer-facing menu. Throughout the project, I focused on building a clean and structured codebase using modern tools and best practices.
ProjectDetails.details-4: I started developing this project independently, taking responsibility for the initial setup and core functionality before transitioning back to my main project. I implemented key features including the customer-facing menu, payment flow using Checkout, and the admin panel with order management, menu management, analytics, reviews, and detailed restaurant information. I focused on building a solid foundation using modern tools and clean architecture to ensure the project could scale effectively.
ProjectDetails.details-5: This was one of my long-term projects, which I worked on in multiple phases, including periods of independent development. I was responsible for developing most of the admin panel, including authentication (login, registration, password reset), user management, and a multi-step flow for creating bookable venues. I implemented core features such as venue management, image uploads, and a fully customizable booking calendar. The system supported dynamic pricing, allowing custom prices for specific dates, time ranges, and special periods. I developed advanced scheduling logic, including custom working hours and availability rules for specific days or periods. I also worked on booking management, including booking lists, cancellation flows, and integration of cancellation policies for both business owners and customers. On the customer side, I implemented booking cancellation, user accounts, saved payment methods, and booking history. Additionally, I implemented filtering with persistent state (saving filters after page reload), statistics pages, and overall improvements to usability and system behavior.
ProjectDetails.details-6: I contributed to this project by implementing the statistics page and improving the cancellation policy logic, ensuring correct behavior and better usability.
ProjectDetails.details-7: I developed most of the project independently, implementing the core admin panel and subscription system using Checkout. I built user management with role-based access, client management with bulk import (via file upload), and flexible email creation tools. One of the key features I implemented was a customizable email builder with live preview and dynamic variables (e.g., personalized fields like [name]), allowing emails to be tailored for each recipient. Although I later handed over the project to another developer, I delivered a significant portion of the planned functionality.
ProjectDetails.details-8: This was my first large-scale project, where I worked with a strong focus on code quality and testing. I contributed by developing custom components, forms, and validation logic, as well as implementing filters and UI elements such as modals. I worked extensively with real-time updates using WebSockets, solving concurrency issues when multiple users edited data simultaneously. I also wrote and maintained a significant number of tests, ensuring code reliability and quickly identifying issues during development.

About.aboutMeDesc: Based in Odesa, Ukraine, I build fast, user-focused interfaces that feel simple and intuitive. My goal is to turn ideas into smooth digital experiences through clean and thoughtful code.
About.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you shortly.
